name: ADS1118 4-Channel 16-Bit A/D Converter with Internal Temperature Sensor
description: The `ads1118` sensor allows you to use your ADS1118 delta-sigma ADC sensors ([datasheet](https://www.ti.com/lit/ds/symlink/ads1118.pdf)) with ESPHome. First, setup an [ADS1118 Hub](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ads1118#ads1118-component) for your ADS1118 sensor and then use this sensor platform to create individual sensors that will report the voltage.
